title: Blocked in!
description: A world bending datapack that sees you trapped in a small worldborder by a crazed AI. Complete tasks or eat delicious soup to expand your world.
body:
A world bending datapack that sees you trapped in a small worldborder by a crazed AI. Complete tasks or eat delicious soup to expand your world.

Blocked in add a layer of complexity to your vannila minecraft world. Start your new world with this pack and you will be greeted by an AI datapack who has trapped you in a 5x5 box. Using the hints left by the Datapack creator you can expand the area in which you are trapped.
Glitch storms will happen naturaly or have a chance of happening after you sleep. These will temporaraly shut down the AI allowing you to explore the world freely and gather loot. Just dont stay out too long!
There are 11 new recipies added to the game with powerful effects.
The world generation has been altered for smaller biomes making it easier to explore.
I hope you enjoy this chalenge! 
This Pack can be added to other packs for even more challenges!
